title: Gorilla Tape Crystal Clear 8.2m
features: FLEXIBLE: Conforms to rough, smooth and uneven surfaces
EASY TO USE: Can easily be torn by hand
AIRTIGHT & 100% WATERPROOF: Perfect for a wide range of applications both indoors and out
HIGH STRENGTH: Gorilla strength in a crystal clear tape

APPLICATION: Before applying Gorilla Tape, make sure your surface is clean and free of any dust or debris. If there are loose particles (dirt or dust on the surface) the tape’s adhesive will adhere to these particles instead of the actual surface. When the surface is clean apply the tape taking the time to rub the tape firmly to your surface to help achieve a better bond. Ensure that the tape size is larger than the repair area, overlapping tape may increase chance of failure and leaks.
NOTE: Crystal Clear Gorilla Tape is best for smooth surface repairs as textured surfaces do not allow an even airtight bond.
NOTE: Certain materials, including many types of rubber, can be difficult to bond due to the oil or resin content. If you would like more information on how Gorilla Tape bonds to specific substrates.
NOTE: Not recommended for water systems under pressure.
description: From the manufacturer Gorilla Tape Crystal Clear 8.2m Gorilla Tape is extra strong, double-thick and incredibly tough. Whether you need to stick rough, smooth or uneven surfaces, this is the duct tape with extra grip. Indoors and out, you can use Gorilla Tape where you want. The rugged all-weather shell withstands the elements, and the double-thick adhesive remains strong, whatever it faces. Designed to be tearable, developed to be durable, Gorilla Tape stands up to the test. Product Features Sticks Underwater Double thick adhesive. Can be used on rough, uneven surfaces for extra grip. Flexible Tough, weather-resistant shell. Helps create a barrier that can withstand hard elements. High Strength Strong, reinforced backing. The tight weave reinforces, but Gorilla Tape can still be ripped neatly by hand.
